United States · Wyoming · Employment Pay Rights 2026
Wyoming PTO payout law & pay rights
Everything you need to know about Wyoming's PTO payout rules, final paycheck deadlines, and minimum wage — accurate to 2025 state legislation.
PTO payout rule
Depends on employer policy
Accrued vacation must be paid unless a written forfeiture policy was provided and acknowledged.
